TextPersonnalProjects.MainText: Here is a short list of my personnal projects

WelcomeText.title: Zkevitz (Matteo Gigot)
WelcomeText.MainText: Welcome to my portfolio, here you will find a collection of my projects and experiences.

Text42Cursus.title: 42 Cursus
Text42Cursus.MainText: My journey at 42 allowed me to dive deep into computer science through a hands-on, peer-learning approach. From low-level programming in C to full-stack projects, each challenge helped me grow as a developer and problem solver.
Text42Cursus.secondText: Here is a short list of my projects that i've done during my 42 cursus

AboutMeText.title: About Me
AboutMeText.MainText:
Since I was young, I have always been fascinated by technology and programming.
                    In April 2023, I started my curriculum at 42 and discovered the world of coding.
                    Since then, I haven’t stopped programming, whether for personal projects or as part of my studies.
                    I will complete the common core at 42 in July 2025.
                    You can find all my projects and the details of my journey on this website.
